programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Peter and Gillian are searching for a lakefront property to call home and host charity events in; their search for a house on the lake will include tours of an upscale farmhouse and resort-like property with its own pub.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Weston, West Virginia to teach two young carpenter apprentices how to build a timber frame barn; along the way a 4H camper returns to the site to check out the cabin he and his fellow campers built with the guys.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a timber frame home on a frozen field in West Virginia; Mark and Johnny visit an extraordinary mountain top retreat with a log home and timber frame pool house; Alex Webb builds a lord's table and bench at his workshop.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a whole lot of fun in Abingdon, Va, while saving an old barn, the guys explore the local history as they work with a master craftsman, operate an old sawmill, explore a restored cabin, and even drive an antique tractor.
